items.title_en: Tehran's Hormuz threat risks global fallout, Rubio warns as U.S. strikes Iran for 11th straight night
items.title_zh: 鲁比奥警告称，德黑兰的霍尔木兹威胁可能会影响全球，因为美国已连续第11晚袭击伊朗
items.desc_en: His comments come as U.S. Central Command hit Iranian targets for an 11th straight night.
items.desc_zh: 他发表此番言论之际，美国中央司令部已连续第 11 个晚上袭击伊朗目标。

items.title_en: Wistron shares surge in Taiwan after opening of Texas AI superchip plant to supply Nvidia

items.desc_en: Taiwan’s Wistron Corporation opens first U.S. facility in Fort Worth, Texas.
items.desc_zh: 台湾纬创资通公司在德克萨斯州沃斯堡开设了第一家美国工厂。

items.title_en: France passes law banning under-15s from social media
items.title_zh: 法国通过法律禁止15岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
items.desc_en: The law will require social media platforms in France to verify all users age from January.
items.desc_zh: 该法律将要求法国的社交媒体平台从一月份起验证所有用户的年龄。

items.title_en: Michelin-starred restaurateur faces jail for using ants as dessert garnish

items.desc_en: Officials say the restaurant in South Korea used some 49,000 ants in various dishes over four years.
items.desc_zh: 官员称，这家韩国餐厅四年来在各种菜肴中使用了约 49,000 只蚂蚁。

items.desc_zh: 2013 年，索尼对 Xbox 进行了调整，展示了共享 PlayStation 光盘是多么容易。现在，游戏玩家们表示，索尼已经变成了它所嘲笑的样子。

items.title_zh: 耐克将切断中国数千家在线分销商，重组数字足迹
items.desc_en: Nike is streamlining its online business in China as the company looks to stabilize pricing and branding and get back to growth.
items.desc_zh: 耐克正在精简其在中国的在线业务，以稳定定价和品牌并恢复增长。

items.title_en: Capital One earnings were good enough but didn't answer the big question hanging over the stock
items.title_zh: 第一资本的盈利足够好，但没有回答困扰该股的大问题
items.desc_en: Investors want to know when Capital One will begin to see more tangible benefits from its Discover and Brex deals.
items.desc_zh: 投资者想知道第一资本何时开始从 Discover 和 Brex 交易中看到更多切实的好处。

items.title_en: Will AI help you do your job or replace you?
items.title_zh: 人工智能会帮助你完成你的工作还是取代你？
items.desc_en: Artificial Intelligence companies make vast claims about their tools replacing human labour - our charts show what's happening.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能公司大肆宣称他们的工具可以取代人类劳动力——我们的图表显示了正在发生的事情。

items.title_en: The world's top fintech companies: 2026
items.title_zh: 全球顶尖金融科技公司：2026
items.desc_en: Fintech is entering an era of scale and maturity, just as AI forces innovation. CNBC and Statista name the key players shaping the industry — and shaking it up.
items.desc_zh: 正如人工智能推动创新一样，金融科技正在进入规模化、成熟化的时代。 CNBC 和 Statista 列出了塑造该行业并撼动该行业的关键参与者。

items.title_en: The Fed rang the alarm about Anthropic's Mythos AI model — but had to go months without it
items.title_zh: 美联储对 Anthropic 的 Mythos AI 模型敲响了警钟，但不得不几个月没有使用它
items.desc_en: The central bank didn't have access to Claude Mythos Preview as of mid-July, even as other institutions were racing to patch their vulnerabilities.
items.desc_zh: 截至 7 月中旬，央行还无法访问 Claude Mythos Preview，尽管其他机构正在竞相修补其漏洞。

items.title_en: Tokyo urges men to wear shorts to work, but some women say it's 'leg hair harassment'
items.title_zh: 东京敦促男性穿短裤上班，但一些女性称这是“腿毛骚扰”
items.desc_en: The Tokyo Metropolitan Government wants workers to ditch the suit and tie for t-shirts, trainers - and shorts.
items.desc_zh: 东京都政府希望工人们抛弃西装和领带，改穿 T 恤、运动鞋和短裤。

items.title_en: Super Micro surges 15% on new order and margin disclosure after SpaceX announcement
items.title_zh: SpaceX 宣布新订单和保证金披露后，Super Micro 股价飙升 15%
items.desc_en: Many server makers are seeing faster growth as companies race to deploy artificial intelligence servers.
items.desc_zh: 随着公司竞相部署人工智能服务器，许多服务器制造商都看到了更快的增长。

items.title_en: OpenAI appoints two new members to board of directors
items.title_zh: OpenAI 任命两名新董事会成员
items.desc_en: OpenAI appointed longtime financial executives David Vélez and Robin Vince to its nonprofit and for-profit boards.
items.desc_zh: OpenAI 任命长期担任财务高管的 David Vélez 和 Robin Vince 为其非营利和营利性董事会成员。

items.title_en: The sell-off in Korean stocks may soon subside. That could be good news for U.S. markets
items.title_zh: 韩国股市的抛售可能很快就会平息。这对美国市场来说可能是个好消息
items.desc_en: South Korea's stock market could be turning around — and some investors expect its U.S. counterpart won't be far behind.
items.desc_zh: 韩国股市可能会出现好转，一些投资者预计美国股市也不会落后太多。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Dogs have a great sense of smell. Now machines are being trained to sniff out odours.
items.desc_zh: 狗有很强的嗅觉。现在机器正在接受训练来嗅出气味。

items.title_en: Zelensky sacks Ukraine's top army commander after days of protests
items.title_zh: 经过数天的抗议后，泽伦斯基解雇了乌克兰最高陆军司令
items.desc_en: Oleksandr Syrskyi is dismissed after days of unrest over the removal of popular Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.
items.desc_zh: 亚历山大·西尔斯基 (Oleksandr Syrskyi) 在因受欢迎的国防部长米哈伊洛·费多罗夫 (Mykhailo Fedorov) 免职而引发数天骚乱后被解雇。

items.title_en: Goldman Sachs creates private markets platform as rich investors seek the next SpaceX and Stripe
items.title_zh: 高盛创建私募市场平台，富有投资者寻求下一个 SpaceX 和 Stripe
items.desc_en: Goldman Sachs is launching a new alternative investments platform aimed at giving wealthy clients and family offices direct stakes in private companies.
items.desc_zh: 高盛正在推出一个新的另类投资平台，旨在让富裕客户和家族办公室直接持有私营公司的股份。

items.title_en: Apple prepares a new way to buy iPhones. Plus, making sense of Google's new AI models
items.title_zh: Apple 准备了一种购买 iPhone 的新方式。另外，了解谷歌的新人工智能模型
items.desc_en: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.
items.desc_zh: 每个工作日，投资俱乐部都会发布最后冲刺；下午交易最后一小时的可行更新。

items.title_en: Two French firefighters die tackling blaze near Bordeaux airport
items.title_zh: 两名法国消防员在波尔多机场附近扑灭大火时丧生
items.desc_en: The blaze close to the parking lots at Bordeaux-Mérignac Airport is said to have originated from a brush fire.
items.desc_zh: 波尔多梅里尼亚克机场停车场附近的大火据说是由灌木丛火灾引起的。

items.title_en: Brazil's Amazon sees sharp decline in size of area burned in 2025
items.title_zh: 巴西亚马逊预计 2025 年烧毁面积将急剧下降
items.desc_en: The amount of land burned in the world's largest rainforest was the smallest since MapBiomas records began in 1985.
items.desc_zh: 自 1985 年 MapBiomas 开始记录以来，世界上最大的热带雨林被烧毁的土地面积是最小的。

items.title_en: Israeli air strike in Gaza City kills family of six, medics say
items.title_zh: 医务人员称，以色列对加沙城的空袭造成一家六口死亡
items.desc_en: Firas al-Masri, his wife and their four children died in the attack, which the Israeli military says targeted a Hamas operative.
items.desc_zh: 费拉斯·马斯里、他的妻子和四个孩子在这次袭击中丧生，以色列军方称这次袭击的目标是一名哈马斯特工。

items.title_en: Dozens hurt in Bologna protests after man dies while being restrained by police
items.title_zh: 博洛尼亚抗议活动中，一名男子被警察制服后死亡，数十人受伤
items.desc_en: Thousands of people took to the streets demanding justice for a Moroccan-born man who died on Sunday.
items.desc_zh: 数千人走上街头，要求为周日去世的一名摩洛哥出生的男子伸张正义。

items.title_en: Shock and anger after top Ghanaian politician sentenced to 20 years for illegal mining
items.title_zh: 加纳高级政客因非法采矿被判 20 年徒刑后的震惊和愤怒
items.desc_en: Bernard Antwi Boasiako, known as "Chairman Wontumi", was also fined more than $10,000 (£7,450).
items.desc_zh: 被称为“主席 Wontumi”的伯纳德·安特维·博阿西亚科 (Bernard Antwi Boasiako) 也被罚款超过 10,000 美元（7,450 英镑）。

items.title_zh: 以色列正在加沙境内修建长达数英里的土墙，巩固其分裂 - 美联社新闻
items.desc_en: Israel is building a miles-long earthen barrier inside Gaza, entrenching its division  AP NewsSee more headlines & perspectives on Google News
items.desc_zh: 以色列正在加沙境内修建长达数英里的土墙，巩固其分裂美联社新闻在 Google 新闻上查看更多头条新闻和观点

items.title_en: Lebanese army says troops deploying in 'pilot zone' after Israeli withdrawal
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩军队称以色列撤军后部队部署在“试验区”
items.desc_en: A US-brokered agreement should see Israeli troops pulling out of a small part of Lebanon occupied during their conflict with Hezbollah.
items.desc_zh: 在美国斡旋的协议中，以色列军队应该从与真主党冲突期间占领的黎巴嫩一小部分地区撤出。

items.title_en: Jamie Dimon says markets underestimate risks and he wouldn't buy stocks or Treasurys at current prices
items.title_zh: 杰米戴蒙表示市场低估了风险，他不会以当前价格购买股票或国债
items.desc_en: Comments from JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon contrast with investors' recent willingness to look past wars, tariffs and other shocks.
items.desc_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙的言论与投资者最近愿意忽视战争、关税和其他冲击的态度形成鲜明对比。

items.title_en: AI minister role boosted but tech department axed in Burnham shake-up
items.title_zh: 伯纳姆改组中人工智能部长职位得到提升，但技术部门被削减
items.desc_en: Kanishka Narayan will attend cabinet - but no longer have the leadership of a technology secretary.
items.desc_zh: 卡尼什卡·纳拉扬 (Kanishka Narayan) 将出席内阁会议，但不再拥有技术部长的领导权。

items.title_en: 'Anti-ICE' army veteran started fire outside Manhattan federal building, say officials
items.title_zh: 官员称，“反ICE”退伍军人在曼哈顿联邦大楼外开火
items.desc_en: Andrew Arrabaca, 43, was armed with two axes, a machete, three knives and fireworks, says the FBI.
items.desc_zh: FBI 称，43 岁的安德鲁·阿拉巴卡 (Andrew Arrabaca) 携带两把斧子、一把砍刀、三把刀和烟花。

items.title_en: Trump imposes 50% tariff on Canadian imports
items.title_zh: 特朗普对加拿大进口商品征收50%关税
items.desc_en: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.
items.desc_zh: 这些关税标志着北美邻国之间的贸易紧张局势大幅升级。

items.title_en: Thousands of websites taken down for illegal World Cup streams
items.title_zh: 数千个因非法世界杯直播而被关闭的网站
items.desc_en: More than 1,000 illegal streaming sites were shut down in the US during the tournament, with a similar amount blocked in Colombia.
items.desc_zh: 比赛期间，美国关闭了 1,000 多个非法流媒体网站，哥伦比亚也屏蔽了类似数量的网站。

items.title_en: Ofcom unable to take further legal action against suicide forum
items.title_zh: Ofcom 无法对自杀论坛采取进一步的法律行动
items.desc_en: The regulator said it had "no further legal routes available" under the Online Safety Act.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，根据《在线安全法》，“没有其他可用的合法途径”。

items.title_en: AliExpress fined record €550m by EU for allowing sale of illegal goods
items.title_zh: 全球速卖通因允许销售非法商品而被欧盟罚款创纪录的 5.5 亿欧元
items.desc_en: The Chinese retailer allowed unsafe toys and counterfeit clothes to be sold on its site, says the EU.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟表示，这家中国零售商允许在其网站上销售不安全的玩具和假冒服装。

items.desc_zh: 该公司推出了一个大规模的新人工智能模型，据称可以与美国顶尖公司抗衡。

items.desc_zh: 特朗普媒体正在为华尔街交易员推出快速、付费的社交帖子。

items.title_en: Teen hackers who live streamed cyber-attack on TfL jailed
items.title_zh: 直播伦敦交通局网络攻击的青少年黑客被判入狱
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
items.title_zh: TikTok 因儿童年龄检查面临 Ofcom 调查
items.desc_en: It follows a review by the regulator in May that criticised the platform for not being "safe enough" for children.
items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。

items.title_zh: SpaceX 股价跌破上市首日价

items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克的火箭公司自一个月前上市以来，其股票交易一直波动较大。

items.title_en: Midnight social media curfew proposed for UK teens aged 16 and 17
items.title_zh: 英国提议对 16 岁和 17 岁青少年实行午夜社交媒体宵禁
items.desc_en: The government says it will improve teenagers' lives but campaigners call it a "missed opportunity".
items.desc_zh: 政府表示这将改善青少年的生活，但活动人士称这是“错失的机会”。

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。
